_comment: Copy to deploy.config.json (gitignored, machine-local). Schema 2: targets are keyed by WINDOWS USER ($env:USERNAME) so each user on this machine can pick their own Cinema(s). 'targets' is a LIST - every entry is deployed in one run. The 'deploy' skill in Claude Code fills this interactively. Legacy flat configs ({cinema, location, plugin_dir}) are migrated automatically.
